n: Chapter 1.6: True Hearts and Proven Loyalties

steps.t: The Pelargir Armoury is to the south of Sirgon's Manor.
The guardswoman Cuguril stands watch outside the Pelargir Armoury.
Cuguril invited you to check on the Armour of the Usurper inside the Pelargir Armoury, as long as you also deal with any of the pests you might find i…
Cuguril stands watch outside the Pelargir Armoury.
Legolas has begun a dramatic argument for the benefit of the nearby onlooker, and he needs your help to show that you are truly <rgb=#00FF00>ang…
Legolas stands outside the Pelargir Armoury, pretending to be angry with you.
The suspicious onlooker is to the south-east of the Pelargir Armoury, in King's Gondor.
The woman Aithil is south-east of the Pelargir Armoury, in King's Gondor.
